title: Modpack Core Essentials
description: Change game window title and icon. Add a welcome message to the screen when you first start the game. Very light. Easy to customize. Zero bloat.
body:
A lightweight, client-side utility mod built for modpack creators.

Modpack Core Essentials gives modpack authors a clean set of tools to customize modpack without any performance overhead.

✨ Features ✨

 

🪟 Custom Game Window Title Set a custom title for the Minecraft window to match your modpack's branding. Players will see your modpack's name in their game window title.

🖼️ Custom Window Icon Replace the default Minecraft window icon with your own.

📋 Configurable Welcome Screen Display a welcome screen when players launch the game. You can configure it to appear only once (on first launch) or every time the game starts -> great for changelogs, server announcements, or greetings.

⚙️ Full ModMenu Integration Seamlessly integrates with ModMenu, providing an in-game config editor so you can tweak settings without leaving the game.

❤️ But also easy config file!

🔧 FAQ:

- Is this mod Client-Side Only?

  • This mod runs entirely on the client. No need to install it on server.

- Why doesn't the icon load when I click the reload button?

  • Because you can't “reload” a window icon. You need to restart the game.

- What size should the icon be?

  • 64x64 or 32x32

Built with ❤️ by the MoonPlay Team.
